data.title: Whale Suspected of Selling 4,500 BTC Amid Transfers
data.description: A large Bitcoin holder is suspected of selling 4,500 BTC, according to recent monitoring by lookonchain. According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, the transfer of these Bitcoins occurred eight hours ago, with NYDIG moving the assets to several entities, including Wintermute, Cumberland, FalconX, B2C2 Group, and Galaxy Digital. This movement suggests a potential sale execution.

data.title: Crypto Startups Secure $197 Million Amid Selective Investor Climate
data.description: Crypto startups have successfully raised $197 million this week. According to NS3.AI, the fundraising environment is becoming more challenging as investors are making fewer and more selective investments. Notable companies that secured significant funding include Startale Labs, Ledger, and Tazapay. The capital is increasingly being directed towards stablecoin infrastructure, payment solutions, and enhancing financial connectivity.

data.title: A whale moved 4,500 BTC to multiple market makers, worth approximately $296 million.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, NYDIG transferred 4,500 BTC to multiple market maker addresses, including Wintermute, Cumberland, FalconX, B2C2 Group, and Galaxy Digital, about 8 hours ago, involving approximately $295.5 million.

data.title: Ju.com's "Meme Second Round IPO Plan" Phase 1, CHIBIPA, will open for subscription.
data.description: Ju.com's "Meme Second Round IPO Plan" Phase 1, CHIBIPA, will officially open for subscription on March 28th at 16:00 and end on March 31st at 16:00. The platform will complete settlement within 4 hours after the subscription ends and complete TGE on March 31st at 20:00, opening the CHIBIPA/JU trading pair. This round continues the multi-currency participation mechanism; users can participate using JU/USDT/BTC/ETH, and the platform will uniformly convert and allocate tokens based on USDT. This round also introduces a dynamic winning rate model. Furthermore, successfully inviting friends to participate will allow you to share up to 20% of the final issuance in token rewards.

data.title: NYDIG Transfers 4,500 BTC to Multiple Firms, Potential Sale Indicated
data.description: NYDIG has transferred 4,500 BTC to Wintermute, Cumberland, FalconX, B2C2 Group, and Galaxy Digital. According to Foresight News, this transaction occurred eight hours ago and may be intended for sale.

data.title: BNB Chain Engages with Blockchain Community at Penn Conference
data.description: BNB Chain announced its participation in the Penn Blockchain Conference, engaging with the blockchain community at the University of Pennsylvania. YZi Labs posted on X. The event spans two days, providing a platform for discussions and networking opportunities within the blockchain sector. Attendees can expect to share insights and explore developments in blockchain technology.

data.title: Altcoin Season Index Declines as Bitcoin Outperforms
data.description: CoinMarketCap's Altcoin Season Index has decreased by four points, reaching a level of 45. According to NS3.AI, the index measures the performance of altcoins relative to Bitcoin, defining an altcoin season as a period when 75% of the top 100 cryptocurrencies outperform Bitcoin over the previous 90 days. This decline indicates that fewer altcoins are surpassing Bitcoin's performance, suggesting a shift in market dynamics.

data.title: US senators have called for an investigation into Bitmain's security risks and its ties to the Trump family.
data.description: U.S. Senator Elizabeth Warren sent a letter to Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick requesting information regarding potential national security risks posed by Bitmain and raising concerns about its business dealings with the Trump family. The letter requested the disclosure of communications between Bitmain and Eric Trump and Donald Trump Jr. Reports indicate that the FBI is conducting an investigation known as "Operation Red Sun" to assess the potential risk of remote control of related mining equipment. Previously, U.S. regulators have repeatedly raised concerns about the security of Bitmain's products. Bitmain responded that the allegations are unfounded, and American Bitcoin Corp. stated that its security tests found no issues. (Bloomberg)

data.title: Solana Spot ETFs Experience Significant Net Outflow
data.description: U.S. Solana (SOL) spot ETFs saw a substantial net outflow of $7.8369 million in a single day. According to NS3.AI, the Bitwise Solana Staking ETF was the sole fund experiencing these net outflows.

data.title: Singapore Court Orders Halt to False Claims Against Curve Contributor
data.description: A Singapore court has issued an order to cease false claims and harassment directed at Curve contributor Haowi Wong. According to NS3.AI, the court also awarded approximately $1,900 in damages. This legal action follows a $9.3 million exploit of the Resupply protocol in June 2025, which led some community members to blame Curve and allege the project's direct involvement.

data.title: Wang Chun withdrew 9,000 ETH from the associated address and deposited them into Aave, bringing his current holdings to 79,818 ETH.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, an address associated with F2Pool founder Wang Chun withdrew 9,000 ETH from Binance approximately 8 hours ago, worth about $17.86 million, and deposited it all into Aave. This address currently holds a total of 79,818 ETH, worth approximately $158.7 million.

data.title: Tehran Experiences Major Airstrikes Amid Tensions
data.description:
Tehran was subjected to intense airstrikes early on March 28, according to CCTV International News. According to BlockBeats, the attacks, carried out by U.S. and Israeli forces, are considered the largest in recent times. Despite widespread media attention on the 'Iran-U.S. negotiations,' Iran has yet to release any official information regarding the talks.

Recent military actions by the Iranian Revolutionary Guard and today's large-scale airstrikes on Tehran indicate no signs of easing tensions among the involved parties.

Additionally, Mehr News Agency reported that Iran University of Science and Technology in Tehran was targeted in the airstrikes early on March 28.

data.title: The US Solomon Islands (SOL) spot ETF saw a total net outflow of $7.8369 million in a single day.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, the SOL spot ETF saw a net outflow of $7.8369 million yesterday (March 27th, Eastern Time). Only the Bitwise Solana Staking ETF (BSOL) experienced a net outflow yesterday, with a single-day net outflow of $7.8369 million, while its historical total net inflow has reached $798 million. As of press time, the SOL spot ETF's total net asset value is $810 million, with an SOL net asset ratio of 1.71%, and a historical cumulative net inflow of $986 million.

data.title: P2P.me Team Admits to Polymarket Betting Account and Apologizes
data.description:
The P2P.me team has publicly acknowledged that the Polymarket betting account identified as 'P2P Team' belongs to them and has issued an apology for the betting incident. According to PANews, the team admitted to placing a bet using foundation funds ten days before their fundraising launch, wagering on their ability to raise over $6 million. At that time, they only had a verbal commitment of $3 million from Multicoin, with no signed term sheets or allocation guarantees. Ultimately, they raised $5.2 million, all from independent external investors.

P2P.me conceded that trading on outcomes they could influence undermines trust. They explained that naming the account 'P2P Team' was intended to convey presence and transparency to the community, though they acknowledged that intention did not translate into action. They admitted that failing to disclose information was a mistake and accepted criticism regarding their silence.

The team stated that profits from the prediction market positions would be reinvested into the project's MetaDAO treasury. They plan to liquidate all positions within the next few hours and are developing a formal company policy on future prediction market trading.

data.title: Abstract Integrates Native Support for Merchant Payment Protocol
data.description:
Abstract has announced the integration of native support for the Merchant Payment Protocol (MPP). According to Foresight News, this update enables AI agents to utilize MPP payment services directly via HTTP, facilitating seamless on-chain native transactions.

Abstract aims to provide infrastructure for AI agents supported by the Stripe merchant network. Developers can use the @abstract-foundation/mpp toolkit, which allows AI agents, builders, and users to choose between fiat currency, cryptocurrency, or streaming micropayments.

data.title: Google to Invest Over $5 Billion in Texas Data Center for Anthropic
data.description:
Google is set to finalize a deal to provide over $5 billion in funding for a data center project in Texas, developed by Nexus Data Centers. According to Odaily, the facility will be leased to Anthropic upon completion. Spanning approximately 2,800 acres, the data center is expected to deliver around 500 megawatts of computing power by the end of 2026, with plans for further expansion.

The data center will utilize natural gas pipelines and proprietary gas turbines for power, reducing reliance on the public grid. Previously, Google Cloud has supported Anthropic with TPU computing power, and this investment marks a further extension of their collaboration.

data.title: Google plans to provide over $5 billion in support for the Anthropic Texas data center project.
data.description: Google is close to an agreement to provide over $5 billion in funding for Nexus Data Centers' data center project in Texas, which will be leased to Anthropic upon completion. The 2,800-acre project is expected to provide approximately 500 megawatts of computing power as early as the end of 2026, with plans for further expansion. Reports indicate that the data center will rely on natural gas pipelines and its own gas turbines for power, reducing dependence on the public power grid. Google has previously provided TPU computing power to Anthropic through Google Cloud, and this funding is seen as a further extension of the partnership.

data.title: Crypto stocks closed lower across the board in the US market, with SBET falling more than 7.5%.
data.description: According to data from msx.com, at the close of trading on the US stock market, the Dow Jones Industrial Average fell 1.73%, the S&P 500 fell 1.67%, and the Nasdaq Composite fell 2.15%. The crypto sector saw widespread declines, with SBET falling over 7.5%, COIN falling over 7%, ALTS falling over 6.8%, MARA falling over 6.5%, HOOD falling over 6.15%, ABTC falling over 5.83%, BMNR falling over 5.55%, MSTR falling over 5.19%, and CRCL falling over 4.69%. msx.com is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, covering US stock and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.

data.title: US lawmakers have introduced a draft of the PARITY Act, which would provide a $200 tax exemption only for regulated dollar stablecoins.
data.description: U.S. Representatives Steven Horsford and Max Miller released a draft of the "Digital Asset Parity Act," which aims to promote the development of digital assets and improve compliance by establishing a unified tax framework. The draft proposes a small tax exemption for regulated USD stablecoin transactions under $200 to reduce the tax burden on daily payments; it also allows miners and stakers to defer tax payments on rewards for up to five years. Furthermore, the draft plans to extend false sale and presumed sale rules to digital assets and introduce tax treatments such as valuation by market capitalization, while clarifying tax rules for digital asset lending and charitable donations. The bill is currently under discussion and has not yet been formally submitted to Congress.
